opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Rescued my pet-destroyed couch for $47 — looks brand new
opportunities.before_state: Couch covered in pet hair, claw marks, stains, and odor; guests avoid sitting on it
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, fitted cover that hides all damage — couch looks showroom fresh
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season is peak for pet hair complaints on furniture, driving massive search volume for sofa covers in April-May.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia expandable bamboo drawer divider set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Transformed my chaotic junk drawer for $32 in 10 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Kitchen drawers overflowing with tangled utensils, random items, impossible to find anything
opportunities.after_state: Every drawer perfectly sectioned, utensils visible and accessible, kitchen feels twice as functional
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning is at its annual peak in late April, with kitchen organization consistently the #1 searched home improvement topic during this window.

opportunities.specific_product: Amazon Basics 2-tier adjustable under-sink shelf organizer
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned my bathroom disaster zone into a spa cabinet for $28
opportunities.before_state: Under-sink cabinet stuffed with falling bottles, tangled cords, expired products and zero visibility
opportunities.after_state: Two-tier pull-out shelving system with every product visible, grouped, and easily accessible
opportunities.why_now: Spring bathroom refresh is trending alongside kitchen cleaning, and the under-sink Reel format converts exceptionally well due to the dramatic reveal factor.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor sectional sofa set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned my bare patio into an outdoor living room for $299
opportunities.before_state: Empty or neglected patio/backyard with no seating, just concrete or dead grass with forgotten items
opportunities.after_state: Styled outdoor lounge with cushioned sectional, throw pillows, and ready-to-entertain setup
opportunities.why_now: Late April marks the start of outdoor entertaining season in most US markets, and patio furniture searches spike sharply through Memorial Day weekend.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm Original Side Sleeper Pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Woke up pain-free for the first time in years — $89 pillow changed everything
opportunities.before_state: Waking up every morning with neck and shoulder pain, flat dead pillow that offers zero support for side sleepers
opportunities.after_state: Curved ergonomic pillow that keeps spine aligned all night, waking up rested with zero neck stiffness
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for neck pain side sleeper
pillow for shoulder pain while sleeping
opportunities.why_now: Neck pain and sleep quality content is evergreen but sees a spring uptick as people reset routines; the 20% commission makes this high-value even at moderate volume.
